The '''DXR-6b disruptor rifle''', sometimes improperly named '''DXR-6 disruptor rifle''', was a [[Disruptor/Legends|disruptor]] rifle variant of the [[DXR-6 disruptor rifle|DXR-6 disruptor]] produced by the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. This weapon possessed an oversized [[XCiter/Legends|XCiter]] that permitted the actuating blaster module to process great volumes of blaster gas to produce powerful shots.<ref name="SWG:DDR" />

During [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] scientists working at a secret [[Geonosian Bio-Lab|bio-lab]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] had schematics for the DXR-6b rifle, which was enhanced by two Geonosian power cubes.<ref name="SWG:GBLF">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=poi|Geonosian Bio-Lab Facility|Yavin 4}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The DXR-6b disruptor rifle appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:DDR" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The DXR-6b disruptor rifle was added to the game along with the [[W:c:swg:Geonosian Caves|Geonosian Bio-Lab]] introduced in the [[W:c:swg:Update Notes: 24 February 04|update]] released on [[February 24]], [[2004]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 6: The Imperial Crackdown">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=60893|text=Publish 6: The Imperial Crackdown}}</ref>
